global.description: The ad features a vibrant and engaging design with a focus on competition and rewards.
global.main_message: Compete and earn rewards in NeonArena.

elements.label: Abstract textured background
elements.description: A textured background with a mix of dark and light shades, creating a dynamic and engaging visual effect.

elements.label: NeonArena logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo featuring the text 'NeonArena' in bright neon colors, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Mysterious text
elements.description: An abstract, distorted text that appears to be a mix of letters, giving a cryptic and intriguing feel.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A clear and bold headline stating 'Beat your rivals' in a vibrant color, positioned centrally to attract attention.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent call-to-action button that says 'Start now' in a contrasting color, located at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Beat your rivals Free rewards for new players

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline in the center, with body text below and the CTA at the bottom.
